compiled_state.title: 5888-bb7e: Task B — Update CLAUDE.md, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, and domain-logic.md for behavioral drift prevention
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
5888-bb7e — Update project docs to reflect behavioral drift prevention enhancements

## testing_mode
GREEN

## TDD (GREEN phase — makes Task A tests pass)
Update 3 documentation files so all 5 tests in test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh pass GREEN.

## Files to Modify

### 1. CLAUDE.md — Agent Routing Table

In the Named-agent dispatch table, add a row for dso:scope-drift-reviewer:
| dso:scope-drift-reviewer | sonnet | /dso:fix-bug Step 7.1 (scope-drift review after fix verification; skipped when scope_drift.enabled=false) |

Also update the dso:intent-search row to mention INTENT_CONFLICT:
Old: | dso:intent-search | sonnet | /dso:fix-bug Step 1.5 (Gate 1a — pre-investigation intent search; skipped for CLI_user-tagged bugs) |
New: | dso:intent-search | sonnet | /dso:fix-bug Step 1.5 (Gate 1a — pre-investigation intent search; skipped for CLI_user-tagged bugs); emits INTENT_CONFLICT signal when callers depend on current behavior (enhanced caller traversal via Step 7b) |

### 2. plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md — Add scope_drift.enabled Key

Add a new config entry for scope_drift.enabled:
- Key: scope_drift.enabled
- Default: true
- Type: boolean
- Description: When true, fix-bug runs the scope-drift reviewer (Step 7.1) after fix verification and before Gates 2a-2d. When false, Step 7.1 is skipped entirely.
- See also: dso:scope-drift-reviewer agent

### 3. docs/reference/domain-logic.md — Add Gate and Signal Entries

Add to the gate reference table (or create one if absent):
- scope-drift gate: Step 7.1 in fix-bug; primary signal; classifies fix drift as in_scope / ambiguous / out_of_scope; blocks major-drift fixes before commit

Add to the signal types table (or near existing gate signal documentation):
- INTENT_CONFLICT: emitted by dso:intent-search when caller traversal finds callers depending on the behavior the ticket wants to change; fields: behavioral_claim, conflicting_callers, dependency_classification

## .test-index Update (REQUIRED)
Remove RED marker [test_claude_md_scope_drift_reviewer_entry]:
- BEFORE: CLAUDE.md: tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh [test_claude_md_scope_drift_reviewer_entry]
- AFTER: CLAUDE.md: tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md agent routing table contains dso:scope-drift-reviewer row
  Verify: grep -q 'dso:scope-drift-reviewer' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md intent-search row mentions INTENT_CONFLICT
  Verify: grep 'dso:intent-search' CLAUDE.md | grep -q 'INTENT_CONFLICT'
- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents scope_drift.enabled
  Verify: grep -q 'scope_drift.enabled' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
- [ ] docs/reference/domain-logic.md documents scope-drift gate
  Verify: grep -q 'scope.drift\|scope_drift' docs/reference/domain-logic.md
- [ ] docs/reference/domain-logic.md documents INTENT_CONFLICT signal
  Verify: grep -q 'INTENT_CONFLICT' docs/reference/domain-logic.md
- [ ] All 5 tests in test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: grep 'CLAUDE.md.*test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && ! grep 'CLAUDE.md.*\[test_claude_md_scope_drift_reviewer_entry\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
